creator: kenji.rikitake@acm.org
text:
The checksum value of distinfo for sysutils/smartmontools is incorrect, and building the ports aborts.
Fetched port date: Sat Oct 22 08:34:13 JST 2011 (JST = UTC+9 hrs)

Fix: 

Fetch the right distfile from
http://sourceforge.net/projects/smartmontools/files/smartmontools/5.42/
with the name of smartmontools-5.42.tar.gz
and do "make makesum" is my workaround.
The content of distfile should be checked.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/sysutils/smartmontools && make
